title: Final #1389 installed-product closeout gate
goal: Decide whether #1389 can close after #1437 removed the final known ordinary output-shape blocker.
non_goals: Do not claim Agentic Workspace has no remaining surface complexity.
Do not create speculative follow-up work without a concrete installed-product blocker.

review_mode.review question: Is #1389 honestly closable from installed-product evidence after Milestones A-D and #1437?

review_method.commands used: uv run python scripts/run_agentic_workspace.py report --section operational_compression --format json; uv run python scripts/run_agentic_workspace.py start --task "Final #1411 post-#1437 installed-path gate" --select next_safe_action.next_safe_action,action_signals.allowed_next_action,action_signals.hard_blockers --format json; uv run python scripts/run_agentic_workspace.py summary --target . --select todo.active_count,planning_surface_health.status,warning_count --format json; uv run python scripts/run_agentic_workspace.py doctor --target . --modules planning --format json
review_method.evidence sources: Milestone A-D child issue closeouts; installed ordinary-path walkthrough review; #1437 ordinary output-shape compression fix; live operational_compression, start, summary, and planning doctor outputs.

references.label: Gate #1389 closure with abstraction-ladder and installed-path proof
Finish ordinary output-shape compression before #1389 closure

findings.title: #1389 installed-product simplification is satisfied
findings.summary: The ordinary installed path is now AGENTS.md -> start -> one routed next phase, with active work, proof, closeout, fallback, generated/reference surfaces, diagnostics, module ownership, and retained complexity routed or evidenced rather than exposed as a command/manual pile.
findings.evidence: Milestone C and D issues are closed. #1437 landed on master and operational_compression reports ordinary_output_shape_inventory.remaining_count=0, resolved_count=8, proven_count=1, retained_with_evidence_count=7, and no ordinary_output_shape_inventory signal. summary reports todo.active_count=0, planning_surface_health.status=clean, and warning_count=0. planning doctor reports health=healthy, warnings_count=0, and needs_review_count=0 after schema cleanup.
findings.risk if unchanged: Keeping #1389 open after the final known blocker is resolved would convert the epic into a vague umbrella for future friction rather than a bounded simplification lane.
findings.suggested action: Close #1411 as the satisfied gate and close #1389 as satisfied by installed-product proof. Route future friction as new issues.

recommendation.promote: Close #1389 and #1411 with this review as the final gate evidence.
recommendation.dismiss: Dismiss further speculative #1389 follow-up unless a concrete new installed-product blocker is discovered.

retention.proof surface: routed issues, planning state, docs, checks, Memory, or a compact retained review stub

review_finding.rule: Use only these headings when a prose finding is needed; keep the canonical fields structured.

field_map.Next owner: execution_summary/follow-on routed to or required_continuation/owner surface

handoff_or_closeout.rule: Prefer structured fields; use this shape only for short human-readable summaries.

drift_log: 2026-06-11: Final gate evidence recorded after #1437 landed on master.
